# Bioinformatics Review Pre-Synthesis

Generated by `goyoke-team-prepare-synthesis`. This document provides programmatic interaction detection results for the staff-bioinformatician.

---

## Programmatic Cross-Domain Interaction Detection

> Generated by goyoke-team-prepare-synthesis using interaction-rules.json v1.0.0.
> 10 rules evaluated against 22 findings from 4 reviewers.
> 3 interactions detected, 16 findings unmatched.

### Detected Interactions

#### CRITICAL: fdr-chain-inflation (multiplicative)

**Rule:** FDR Chain Inflation from Custom Database

| Source | Reviewer | Sharp Edge | Severity | Finding |
|--------|----------|-----------|----------|---------|
| A | proteogenomics-reviewer | proteogenomics-db-search-inflation | warning | Search database 4.7x reference proteome — FDR impact not quantified |
| B | proteomics-reviewer | proteomics-fdr-global-only | warning | Only PSM-level FDR applied — protein-level FDR missing |

**Interaction:** Database inflation (proteogenomics-db-search-inflation from proteogenomics-reviewer) combined with proteomics-fdr-global-only from proteomics-reviewer — actual variant-class FDR may be 3-5x nominal. See Nesvizhskii 2014 framework for class-specific FDR.
**Algebra:** multiplicative — upstream finding multiplies downstream impact
**Staff-bioinformatician action:** VERIFY this interaction.

---

#### CRITICAL: version-coherence-break (gating)

**Rule:** Cross-Stage Version/Reference Mismatch

| Source | Reviewer | Sharp Edge | Severity | Finding |
|--------|----------|-----------|----------|---------|
| A | genomics-reviewer | genomics-ref-wrong-build | critical | Reference build mismatch: hg19 alignment fed to hg38 VEP cache |
| B | proteogenomics-reviewer | proteogenomics-version-vep-pyensembl | critical | VEP cache version mismatched with PyEnsembl release |

**Interaction:** Version/reference inconsistency detected: genomics-reviewer/genomics-ref-wrong-build(critical), proteogenomics-reviewer/proteogenomics-version-vep-pyensembl(critical). All downstream identification and quantification findings may be invalidated.
**Algebra:** gating — upstream finding invalidates downstream findings
**Staff-bioinformatician action:** VERIFY this interaction.

---

#### CRITICAL: header-format-protein-inference (multiplicative)

**Rule:** FASTA Header Incompatibility Breaking Protein Inference

| Source | Reviewer | Sharp Edge | Severity | Finding |
|--------|----------|-----------|----------|---------|
| A | proteogenomics-reviewer | proteogenomics-fasta-header-incomplete | warning | FASTA headers lack variant position and traceability metadata |
| B | proteomics-reviewer | proteomics-search-header-incompatible | critical | FASTA header format incompatible with MaxQuant protein ID parser |

**Interaction:** FASTA header format (proteogenomics-fasta-header-incomplete) incompatible with search engine parsing (proteomics-search-header-incompatible). PSMs match correctly but protein-level FDR and inference produce garbage.
**Algebra:** multiplicative — upstream finding multiplies downstream impact
**Staff-bioinformatician action:** VERIFY this interaction.

| Reviewer | Sharp Edge | Severity | Finding |

| bioinformatician-reviewer |  | info | Container images not pinned to digest — silent version drift risk |

| genomics-reviewer |  | info | Using BWA-MEM instead of BWA-MEM2 |
| proteogenomics-reviewer | proteogenomics-vcf-chr-prefix | critical | Chromosome prefix mismatch: VCF uses 'chr' prefix but VEP cache expects bare numbers |
| proteogenomics-reviewer | proteogenomics-protein-nmd-included | warning | NMD-susceptible truncated proteins included in search database |
| proteogenomics-reviewer | proteogenomics-db-class-fdr | warning | No class-specific FDR configured for reference vs variant peptide classes |
| proteogenomics-reviewer | proteogenomics-vep-pick-coverage | warning | VEP --pick discards alternative transcript consequences |
| proteogenomics-reviewer |  | info | VEP cache version not explicitly pinned in pipeline config |
| proteomics-reviewer | proteomics-mbr-no-fdr | warning | Match-Between-Runs enabled without FDR assessment for transferred identifications |
| proteomics-reviewer | proteomics-quant-normalization-mismatch | warning | Quantile normalisation applied to TMT-labelled data |
| proteomics-reviewer | proteomics-rescore-training-mismatch | critical | Percolator rescoring model trained on yeast data applied to human peptides |
| proteomics-reviewer |  | info | PSM output table missing scan-level metadata for downstream validation |
